title: Zabrak field armor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Zabrak_Feild_Armor.jpg|thumb|150px]]
'''Zabrak field armor''' was a high-quality version of [[Armor/Legends|armor]] that was produced by the [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabraks]] of [[Iridonia/Legends|Iridonia]]. This suit was designed to be worn by field [[Commander/Legends|commanders]], and could be distinguished from normal armor by its bright coloration.

{{Clothes-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
